summary: Recording source unknown with fair quality; show noted for rare Sugar Magnolia opener and Sunshine Daydream closer
review: The only commentary available notes the unusual set placement – a non‑New Year’s Sugar Magnolia opening and a Sunshine Daydream closing. No reviewers mentioned sound quality or performance details, leaving the recording quality indeterminate.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, neutral comment was provided; no information on musical execution or audio fidelity to base a stronger rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers gave no feedback on sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Unique set ordering highlighted – Sugar Magnolia used as an opener outside of New Year’s shows and Sunshine Daydream placed as the set closer.
